infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app requires location access in the foreground to verify your punch-in/out range relative to the office geofence.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app requires location access in the background to log your route and verify compliance with office geofencing rules while you are clocked in.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app requires location access in the background to log your route and verify compliance with office geofencing rules while you are clocked in.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app requires camera access to take selfies during punch-in and punch-out for identity verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app requires photo library access to allow uploading profile images.
